item.title: Prefiled for introduction.
item.description: Prefiled for introduction.

item.title: 👎💵Josie Cummings - Avista Corp.
item.description: Josie Cummings signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Avista Corp.. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👎💵Maggie Douglas - Puget Sound Energy
item.description: Maggie Douglas signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Puget Sound Energy. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Dr Joseph Berkson - WA Physicians for Social Responsibility
item.description: Dr Joseph Berkson signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent WA Physicians for Social Responsibility.

item.title: ❓Tammy Fellin - Department of Labor & Industries
item.description: Tammy Fellin signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Department of Labor & Industries.

item.title: ❓Phaedra Beckert - WASEIA (Washington Solar Energy Industries Association)
item.description: Phaedra Beckert signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent WASEIA (Washington Solar Energy Industries Association).

item.title: 👍Cora Stryker - Bright Saver
item.description: Cora Stryker signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Bright Saver.

item.title: First reading, referred to Environment & Energy.
item.description: First reading, referred to Environment & Energy.

item.title: 👎💵Matthew Hepner - IBEW/ceww
item.description: Matthew Hepner signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent IBEW/ceww. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Wesley Schrock - Bright Saver
item.description: Wesley Schrock signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Bright Saver.

item.title: 👎💵Peter Godlewski - Association of Washington Business
item.description: Peter Godlewski signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Association of Washington Business. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: ❓💵Nicolas Garcia - WPUDA
item.description: Nicolas Garcia signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent WPUDA. They are a registered lobbyist.
